meta.title: Contact | Armature Wealth Office
meta.description: Begin with a diagnostic conversation. No pitch, no pressure — just clarity.

intro.body: If what you have read reflects what you already feel, the next step is a focused diagnostic conversation — confidential, with no obligation.
intro.note: This form is not a commitment. It is a signal of interest.

form.successBody: We received your inquiry. A member of our team will respond within one business day.

items.title: Confidential
items.body: All conversations are treated as strictly privileged.

items.title: No obligation
items.body: The diagnostic conversation is complimentary and carries no commitment.

items.title: Direct access
items.body: You will speak directly with a principal — not a sales team.
